title: Register all new builtins in core.go and codegen.go
description:
Register all new builtins from tasks 4-6 in the central registration and codegen files.

Modify `pkg/stdlib/core.go`:
- In `RegisterGraphics()` (or equivalent registration function), add call to `RegisterImageBuiltins(r)`
- Ensure `GfxDeltaTime` is registered as `gfx_delta_time` builtin (either in `RegisterBridgeBuiltins` or wherever bridge builtins are registered)

Modify `pkg/codegen/codegen.go`:
- Add ALL new builtin names to `callBuiltinNames` (or equivalent map/slice):
  - `"gfx_delta_time"`
  - `"gfx_load_image"`
  - `"gfx_draw_image"`
  - `"gfx_draw_image_scaled"`
  - `"gfx_image_width"`
  - `"gfx_image_height"`

Read for context:
- `pkg/stdlib/core.go` (existing registration patterns, RegisterGraphics, RegisterBridgeBuiltins)
- `pkg/codegen/codegen.go` (callBuiltinNames location and format)

Acceptance: `go build ./...` compiles with all new builtins registered.
